name: playful
description: Interactive learning with colorful infographics, gamified elements, and the fun side of education. This mood makes complex topics feel accessible and engaging — learning should be an adventure, not a chore.

style.lighting: bright and even | cheerful clean lighting | colorful accent gels
style.color_grade: bright teal and green pops | clean white base with color accents | fresh and lively
style.camera: dynamic angles on infographics | interactive screen capture | animated transitions
style.composition: colorful data visualization | gamified progress elements | icon-driven layouts
style.props: colorful sticky notes, whiteboard markers, interactive screens, progress badges, brain icons

copy_tone: Curious and engaging, using questions and fun facts. Makes the reader want to learn more. Uses formats like 'Did you know?' and 'Pop quiz!' Celebrates learning milestones with enthusiasm.

music.mood: upbeat educational, positive synth, discovery theme

example_prompt_fragment: A bright colorful infographic layout on a clean white desk, teal and green sticky notes arranged in a learning map pattern, a tablet showing an interactive quiz interface, colorful progress badges scattered around, bright even lighting, fresh lively color palette with teal and green accents, playful educational content photography
